parameters.name: name
parameters.description: This value is HTML encoded. For display purposes use the method DisplayName() instead.

parameters.name: businessName
parameters.description: This value is HTML encoded. For display purposes use the method DisplayBusinessName() instead.

parameters.name: limitCollectionCreation
parameters.description:
If set to true, only owners, admins, and some custom users can create and delete collections.
If set to false, any organization member can create a collection, and any member can delete a collection that
they have Can Manage permissions for.

parameters.name: allowAdminAccessToAllCollectionItems
parameters.description:
If set to true, admins, owners, and some custom users can read/write all collections and items in the Admin Console.
If set to false, users generally need collection-level permissions to read/write a collection or its items.

parameters.name: limitItemDeletion
parameters.description:
If set to true, members can only delete items when they have a Can Manage permission over the collection.
If set to false, members can delete items when they have a Can Manage OR Can Edit permission over the collection.

parameters.name: useRiskInsights
parameters.description: Risk Insights is a reporting feature that provides insights into the security of an organization's vault.

parameters.name: useOrganizationDomains
parameters.description: If true, the organization can claim domains, which unlocks additional enterprise features

parameters.name: useAdminSponsoredFamilies
parameters.description: If set to true, admins can initiate organization-issued sponsorships.

parameters.name: syncSeats
parameters.description: If set to true, organization needs their seat count synced with their subscription

parameters.name: useAutomaticUserConfirmation
parameters.description: If set to true,  user accounts created within the organization are automatically confirmed without requiring additional verification steps.

get.summary: Returns a set of basic information about all members of the organization. This is available to all members of the organization to manage collections. For this reason, it contains as little information as possible and no cryptographic keys or other sensitive data.
Retrieves security tasks for the current user.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Optional filter for task status. If not provided returns tasks of all statuses.

post.summary: This endpoint is only used to set-up email two factor authentication.

lastKnownRevisionDate.description: The last known revision date of the Cipher that this attachment belongs to.

removeCollections.description: If true, the collections will be removed from the ciphers. Otherwise, they will be added.

encryptedFor.description: The Id of the user that encrypted the cipher. It should always represent a UserId.
The Id of the user that encrypted the cipher. It should always represent a UserId.

assigned.description: True if the acting user is explicitly assigned to the collection

CollectionDetailsResponseModel.description: Response model for a collection that is always assigned to the requesting user, including permissions.

masterKeyEncryptedUserKey.description:
The user's symmetric key encrypted with their master key.
Also known as "MasterKeyWrappedUserKey"

OrganizationUserStatusType.description:
Represents the different stages of a member's lifecycle in an organization.
The Bit.Core.Entities.OrganizationUser object is populated differently depending on their Status.

claimedByOrganization.description:
Indicates if the organization claimed the user. If a user is "claimed" by an organization,
the organization has greater control over their account, and some user actions are restricted.

canToggleState.description: Indicates whether the Policy can be enabled/disabled

PrivateKeysResponseModel.description:
This response model is used to return the asymmetric encryption keys,
and signature keys of an entity. This includes the private keys of the key pairs,
(private key, signing key), and the public keys of the key pairs (unsigned public key,
signed public key, verification key).

ProfileOrganizationResponseModel.description:
Sync data for organization members and their organization.
Note: see Bit.Api.AdminConsole.Models.Response.ProfileProviderOrganizationResponseModel for organization sync data received by provider users.

ProfileProviderOrganizationResponseModel.description:
Sync data for provider users and their managed organizations.
Note: see Bit.Api.AdminConsole.Models.Response.ProfileOrganizationResponseModel for organization sync data received by organization members.

tags.name: Push
tags.description:
Routes for push relay: functionality that facilitates communication
between self hosted organizations and Bitwarden cloud.

tags.name: Installations
tags.description:
Routes used to manipulate `Installation` objects: a type used to manage
a record of a self hosted installation.
